text: 1111 - وَقَالَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «مَنْ قَالَ بِالْجِسْمِ فَلاَ تُعْطُوهُ شَيْئاً مِنَ اَلزَّكَاةِ وَ لاَ تُصَلُّوا خَلْفَهُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1111 - Imam Ali ibn Muhammad al-Hadi (as) and Imam Muhammad ibn Ali al-Jawad (as) said:
"Whoever believes in anthropomorphism (al-jism), do not give them anything from the zakat, and do not pray behind them."
